3163900.name: IMAGO
3163900.description:
You will plunge into the role of a journalist who receives strange floppy disks one day. They depict the events you wrote about, but now you become the main character. Demons, witches, cultists and crazy fanatics - you have to go through all this in the game-styled worlds of the 80s.

Immerse yourself in an atmosphere of horror and disgust, sometimes alternating with beautiful and peaceful places.
Nice pixel graphics and attention to every detail are also waiting for you. Solve the riddles and figure out what's going on here.
